items.title: Van Gaal fallout made Di Maria 'hate' Man Utd, but he has no regrets
items.summary: Rows and fall-out with Louis van Gaal, hating his club, the break-in but no regrets - Angel di Maria opens up on his time at Man Utd
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Spain announces 26-man squad; zero Real Madrid players make the cut

items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: ‘We want to play like other teams’: Afghan women’s cricket dreams remain undimmed
items.summary: Benafsha Hashimi fled the Taliban to Australia in 2021 and is determined to fight for the ICC to follow Fifa’s lead and recognise Afghanistan’s exiled players as the national si...
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
